title: Origins: Sculkborn
description: A sculk-themed Origin for the Origins mod. A Sculkborn is a part of the sculk that has managed to gain sentience.
body:
<details>
<summary>🚨 Important! Check This Out Before You Continue! 🚨</summary>

  [**Hey, this Origin is cool and all, but you should check out its spiritual successor, the Sculkspawn. The Sculkspawn is essentially an expanded and improved version of this Origin, featuring enhanced abilities and fun visuals for almost every power. So, why play this when there's a better version? Go check it out now! Why are you still reading? Go!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sculkspawn-origin)

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oaRR3fCvwDs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod. While Pehkui is not mandatory, it is highly recommended.**

**Sculkborn:** You are a part of the sculk that somehow managed to gain sentience.

**Impact:** 🔴🔴🔴

**🟩 Sonic Squeak [​primary]**: At the cost of experience you can send out a nerfed sonic boom.

**🟩 Spread of Sculk [​secondary]:** You can spend experience to make sculk blocks.

**🟢 Friend of the Wardens:** Wardens aren’t aggressive to you, in fact, they think you are adorable.

**🟢 Pass Through Sculk:** You can phase through sculk-related blocks when not wearing armor.

**🟢 Food?:** You can’t eat food, good thing you don’t need to.

**🟢 Fireproof:** You don’t take damage to fire or lava.

**🟢 Home Sweet Home:** You gain speed and 3 extra hearts when standing on or in sculk-related blocks.

**🟢 Adapted to the Dark:** You are used to living in the dark so you can see better in caves and at night.

**🟢 Shrieker Strength:** Upon making contact with a shrieker, you gain strength for 30 seconds.

**🟡 An Ancient Home:** You naturally spawn in an Ancient City.

**🟡 Familiar Footsteps:** Sculk sensors don't detect your footsteps.

**🔴 Small:** You are smaller than the average player. Because of this you can’t use a shield and only have 5 base hearts.

**🔴 Sculk Catalyst:** You don’t naturally regenerate health. The only way for you to get health back is by killing mobs.

**🔴 Allergic to Light:** Being exposed to the sun deals damage to you unless you are wearing a helmet.

**🔴 Scared of Flying:** You can’t use an elytra.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
